meta.title: AKIN Visuals — Video Editing for Coaches & Personal Brands
meta.description: AKIN Visuals helps coaches and personal brands turn raw footage into high-retention videos that drive views and inbound clients. Book a free strategy call.

hero.label: Trusted by creators generating 100K–1M+ views
hero.sub: We help coaches and personal brands turn raw content into consistent views, engagement, and inbound clients through strategic video editing.
hero.trust: High-retention editing • Strategic clipping • Consistent output

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who We Are
about.body: AKIN Visuals is a boutique video editing studio built for coaches and personal brands who want to grow online. We don't just cut footage — we build content strategies that turn every video into a growth asset. With us, you never have to worry about editing again.

portfolio.label: Our Work
portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.sub: See how we turn raw footage into high-retention content for coaches and personal brands.
portfolio.ytCardDesc: Long-form videos edited for maximum retention and growth on YouTube.
portfolio.ttCardDesc: Short-form clips built for daily posting, hooks, and viral growth.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Our Services
services.sub: Three ways we help coaches and personal brands grow online.
services.s1Desc: High-retention, story-driven videos designed to keep viewers engaged from start to finish. Structured storytelling, clean professional editing, optimized for YouTube and personal brands.
services.s2Desc: Consistent, high-quality clips designed for daily posting and growth. Hook optimization, fast pacing, captions and platform formatting — built for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.
services.s3Desc: We edit your long-form content and generate multiple short-form clips from it — giving you consistent output across every platform. Built to maximize every piece of content you create.

testimonials.label: What our clients say
testimonials.title: Direct Feedback
testimonials.t1: AKIN completely redefined our brand's visual identity. The pacing and color work on our latest documentary were simply world-class. Truly professional.
testimonials.t2Q: What did you think of the speed and quality?
testimonials.t2: As a creator, I need an editor who 'gets it'. The turnaround speed and technical precision AKIN brings to every TikTok and Reel is unmatched.
testimonials.t3Q: What did working with AKIN bring you?
testimonials.t3: Our YouTube channel grew from 5K to 40K subscribers in 3 months. AKIN thinks along with strategy, not just editing.

contact.item4: Get a custom proposal within 24 hours

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under the GDPR.
privacy.dataText: When you submit our contact form or book a call, we collect the following information:
privacy.data4: Information about your content needs, volume, and budget
privacy.purposeText: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiry, understand your content needs, and provide you with a tailored proposal or service. We do not use your data for marketing purposes without your consent.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties. Your data is only processed by our team and trusted service providers (e.g., email delivery via Resend) necessary to operate our business.
privacy.storageText: We retain your contact information only as long as necessary to provide your requested services or as required by law. You can request deletion at any time.
privacy.rightsText: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.cookiesText: This website does not use tracking cookies. We only use essential cookies required for the site to function properly.
privacy.contactText: For questions about this privacy policy or to exercise your rights, contact us via the contact form on our website.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using our website and services, you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.servicesText: AKIN Visuals provides video editing and content strategy services as described on our website and in individual agreements with clients. All services are delivered based on the scope and timeline agreed upon in writing.
terms.clientText: Clients are responsible for providing raw footage, brand assets, and clear instructions in a timely manner. Delays in providing materials may affect turnaround times.
terms.paymentText: Payment terms are agreed upon before work begins. For ongoing retainers, invoices are sent monthly. Late payments may result in paused services.
terms.ipText: Upon full payment, clients receive full ownership and usage rights to the final edited videos. AKIN Visuals retains the right to display completed work in our portfolio unless otherwise agreed.
terms.liabilityText: AKIN Visuals is not liable for any indirect damages or lost revenue resulting from the use of our services or this website. Our liability is limited to the value of the services provided.
terms.terminationText: Either party may terminate the agreement with 14 days' written notice for ongoing services. Work completed up to the termination date will be invoiced.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Direct Answers
faq.q1Q: What type of content do you edit?
faq.q1A: We edit long-form YouTube videos, short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. We specialize in content for coaches, consultants, and personal brands who want high-retention videos that convert viewers into clients.
faq.q2Q: How does the editing process work?
faq.q2A: You send us your raw footage via Google Drive or Dropbox. We handle everything — cutting, pacing, color grading, captions, thumbnails, and sound design. You receive the finished video within your agreed turnaround time, ready to publish.
faq.q3A: Standard turnaround is 48–72 hours for short-form content and 4–7 days for long-form videos. Rush delivery is available for an additional fee. We'll agree on a schedule that fits your content calendar during onboarding.
faq.q4Q: Do you offer ongoing retainer packages?
faq.q4A: Yes. Most of our clients work with us on a monthly retainer basis. This gives you a dedicated editor, priority turnaround, and a consistent posting schedule. We offer flexible packages based on your volume needs.
faq.q5A: Absolutely. Every project includes one round of revisions at no extra cost. Additional revision rounds are available. We want to make sure you're completely satisfied with every video we deliver.
faq.q6A: Fill out the contact form above or book a free strategy call. We'll discuss your content goals, current workflow, and how we can help. No commitment — just a conversation to see if we're a good fit.
